arts.ttl: Paddy's Pointers: Four observations after Norwich's 2-0 Leeds defeat
arts.sum: Pink Un editor Paddy Davitt delivers his Leeds United verdict after the Canaries 2-0 Championship defeat

arts.ttl: Unhappy Norwich City boss questions key refereeing decision in Leeds United defeat
arts.sum: Head coach Johannes Hoff Thorup refused to blame referee Matt Donohue for Norwich City's 2-0 defeat to Leeds United. Goals either side of half-time from Solomon and Daniel James condemned the Canaries to a second defeat in Yorkshire in the space of five days.

arts.ttl: Leeds United star lucky to avoid red card against Norwich City after 'reckless' tackle
arts.sum: Former PGMOL general manager Hackett told MOT Leeds News : "Tanaka should have received a second yellow for this reckless challenge. The midfielder, who has been a big hit since moving to Elland Road last summer, was booked in the first half by referee Matthew Donohue for a late challenge on Emiliano Marcondes.

arts.ttl: Leeds ease past Norwich to take Champ top spot once again
arts.sum: Manor Solomon fired the quickest goal in the Championship this season as Leeds beat Norwich 2-0 at Elland Road to regain top spot.

arts.ttl: Leeds United player ratings as Bogle, James and Solomon shine in Norwich City victory
arts.sum: Won the ball high up to start attacks at times too - at one stage on the opposite flank, showing it was not due to a poor marker. Solomon - who now has two goals in as many matches - returned the favour for James on 65 minutes.

arts.ttl: Manor Solomon gets Leeds off to flyer as they beat Norwich to return to top spot
arts.sum: Dan James was also on target.

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Norwich City as Manor Solomon injury severity revealed
arts.sum: Brenden Aaronson and Manor Solomon both start for Leeds United in tonight's clash with Norwich City despite being doubts for the match. Illan Meslier has started every Championship match this season and continues that streak tonight with Jayden Bogle, Ethan Ampadu and Joe Rodon retaining their places in defence from Sunday.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke has already said why Leeds United won’t snatch Burnley playmaker
arts.sum: Leeds United have again been linked with a surprising move to sign Burnley’s outcast winger Mike Tresor, but it’s not a deal that is likely to really entice Daniel Farke. Daniel Farke has already said why Leeds wouldn’t sign Mike Tresor

arts.ttl: MATCHDAY LIVE: Leeds United v Norwich City
arts.sum: Follow live updates and join the debate at Elland Road via our live matchday blog as Norwich City face Leeds United.

arts.ttl: How to watch Leeds United vs Norwich - TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Leeds United resume their Championship campaign this evening when they host Norwich City at Elland Road. Yes, Sky Sports will be broadcasting the fixture between Leeds and Norwich in the Championship.
